holdingZh: Ebrahimi 是英国公司法中准合伙公司与公平清盘的经典判例，强调在个人信赖关系浓厚的封闭公司中，股东之间的衡平因素可以限制严格的章程和多数决逻辑。
holdingEn: Ebrahimi is the classic UK authority on quasi-partnership companies and just-and-equitable winding up, emphasizing that equitable considerations may qualify strict constitutional rights and majority rule in closely held companies built on personal trust.

sources.label: Research platform
sources.noteZh: BAILII 公司法 leading cases 清单收录该案，并标示其为准合伙公司与公平清盘经典案例。
sources.noteEn: BAILII's OpenLaw company-law list identifies the case as a leading authority on quasi-partnerships and just-and-equitable winding up.
